title: Japan’s Trillion-Yen Tussle: Can Low-Cost Giants Become True ‘Flagship’ Funds?
tags: a new report from Morningstar;Morningstar’s Analysis of the Japanese Asset Management IndustryThe Japanese asset management industry, long characterized by the dominance of large, domestic financial conglomerates, is in the midst of a profound transformation. A confluence of regulatory reforms, shifting investor preferences, and the emergence of new product categories is reshaping the competitive dynamics.
